title: Joist Elementor Capability Atlas (v0)
description: @purpose Machine-checked schema for the Elementor capability atlas (EMBODIMENT_APPROACH.md move (a), P1 WP-free half). One record per construct (pre-registered unit: EMBODIMENT_APPROACH.md §4.1, commit 440bb78). Cells start status=assumed; P5 probes flip them to verified/gap with measured deltas. The atlas is the load-bearing input to the P2 authoring contract/linter and the (d) residual policy.

unit.description: Reference to the pre-registered construct unit (doc section + locking commit).

environment.description: Atlas verdicts are versioned per environment (C §5.2); 'unprobed' until P5 runs against a live stack.

aliases.description: Named heads (nav-row, hero-stack, …) are aliases for key-triples per §4.1; aliases may grow, the triple definition may not.

keyTriple.description: §4.1 construct identity. Patterns may use '*' where the construct spans several concrete values of one axis.

count.description: Occurrences under the pre-registered unit (histogram.json). 0 = not detectable in static capture or absent; see notes.

authoringContract.description: What the vision-author may emit for this construct (P2 contract = atlas-expressible only). Surface syntax is HTML-shaped; every construct must map to a transpile rule.

constraints.description: Lint rules the conformance linter enforces for this construct.

elementorTarget.description: The native shape this construct transpiles to.

shape.description: Tree sketch, e.g. 'container(flex-col) > heading + text-editor + button'.

keySettings.description: Load-bearing setting keys with verified spellings (e.g. container 'padding' vs widget '_padding').

status.description: verified = P5 probe passed on this environment; assumed = seeded from docs/memories, pending probe; gap = known inexpressible at this strategy without escalation.

strategy.description: Primary expression strategy on the C §6 channel ladder (editability order).

ceiling.description: Honest expected fidelity ceiling, from the capability matrix.

probe.description: P5 render-verification spec: AUTHOR column (save-survival) + RENDER column (frontend vs ground truth), MIDI-style two verdicts.

author.description: What to PUT (widget/settings sketch); AUTHOR passes iff Document::save() + kses + V4 normalization round-trips byte-stably (lenient hash).

render.description: What to screenshot/measure on the frontend.

residualChannelDefault.description: Default escalation channel when native projection error exceeds threshold (move d). Every escalation is ledgered.

knownGaps.description: Sub-features already known (from docs/memories) to exceed the primary strategy — candidates for 'gap' status after P5 confirms.

provenance.description: Where the seed knowledge came from (knowledge/ docs, transpiler, memories). 'assumed-pending-probe' cells cite docs, never probes.
